Hotel Grande Bretagne

★★★★★
🏛️ Acropolis View🍸 Rooftop Bar👑 Luxury
from €450 /night
Check Availability

Overview

Athens' most iconic luxury hotel overlooking Syntagma Square. Historic grandeur with world-class service.

Who Should Consider Hotel Grande Bretagne

Hotel Grande Bretagne is a 5-star luxury price-signal hotel in Syntagma, with an Acropolis-view signal and a rooftop-bar signal. It is tagged for luxury, special occasions, business.

  • Compare the area on the Syntagma hotel guide.
  • See broader criteria-based picks in Best Hotels in Athens.
  • Compare it with other Athens rooftop bar hotels.

Amenities

PoolSpaRestaurantGymConcierge

✓ Pros

  • Legendary hotel
  • Stunning rooftop
  • Impeccable service

✗ Cons

  • Very expensive
  • Formal atmosphere

Location

Located in Syntagma, 12-15 min walk to the Acropolis.

🏛️ 12-15 min to Acropolis
🚇 5-10 min to metro

Quick Facts

  • Neighborhood: Syntagma
  • Star Rating: 5 stars
  • Price Range: €360-675
  • Acropolis View: Yes ✓
